# Jefferis Software Solutions

> Web design and bespoke software development for small businesses across the UK.

Jefferis Software Solutions builds fast, modern, conversion-focused websites for small businesses. Founded by Finlay Jefferis, the company offers direct client-developer relationships with no agency middlemen. Based in the UK with 5+ years of experience and 20+ sites built.

## Services

- Web Design: Custom websites for small businesses, starting from £445
- Web Development: Mobile-first, performance-optimised sites built with modern tech
- Bespoke Software: Internal tools, dashboards, CRM integrations, and automation
- E-commerce: Full online stores with payment integration, from £1,990

## Packages

- Essential (£445): Up to 5 pages, mobile-first, 7-10 day delivery
- Business (£1,095): Everything in Essential + CMS access, blog, editable pages
- Commerce (£1,990+): Everything in Business + e-commerce, Stripe payments, product management
